title: The Soul of Man
writer: Lee Francis Lybarger, Nina Wilcox Putnam
actors: J.H. Gilmour, William Nigh, Leslie Austin
plot: In his desire to gain the whole world and be a power god, an arrogant rich man almost loses all when his own flesh and blood double-crosses him. But a grandson who refuses to permit greed of gold to destroy his ideals, and a sweet...
